chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You won't believe me but Realme has earbuds which you can connect with 3 devices at once

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: and you get to see Bluetooth version 6.1 which is super crazy.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: By the way, the name of these buds is Realme Buds T500 Pro which has been launched today.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And if you look at their design, they come with a candy box design, super compact,

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: they fit easily in the pocket.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: By the way, they come with a tack wiggle leather design, due to which the in-ear feel is very premium.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You also get to see the lanyard which you can use.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: If we talk about the sound quality, then Sigma has only Hi-Res audio support

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: because you get to see 12.4 mm Titan driver plus LHDC 5.0 support

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: due to which the deep bass is heard very clearly and transparent travel is also given

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: due to which the sound experience comes to the next level.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: As far as the noise cancellation is concerned, you get to see 50 dB Flexi noise cancellation system

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: due to which the background noise is cleared completely.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You also get to see 6 mic support due to which you will call etc.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: so the next person hears your voice very clearly.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: The best thing for gamers is that you get 45ms ultra low latency

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: so there is no delay in gaming time.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Along with that, you also get to see the support of AI translator, which you can use from its application.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: As far as their battery is concerned, they are small but give you 56 hours of battery life with case

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: which is super crazy.

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Realme earbuds are already launched here, if you want to buy them, you can buy them from Flipkart

chunks.title: realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: and tell me in the comment how you like these earbuds.

text: You won't believe me but Realme has earbuds which you can connect with 3 devices at once and you get to see Bluetooth version 6.1 which is super crazy. By the way, the name of these buds is Realme Buds T500 Pro which has been launched today. And if you look at their design, they come with a candy box design, super compact, they fit easily in the pocket. By the way, they come with a tack wiggle leather design, due to which the in-ear feel is very premium. You also get to see the lanyard which you can use. If we talk about the sound quality, then Sigma has only Hi-Res audio support because you get to see 12.4 mm Titan driver plus LHDC 5.0 support due to which the deep bass is heard very clearly and transparent travel is also given due to which the sound experience comes to the next level. As far as the noise cancellation is concerned, you get to see 50 dB Flexi noise cancellation system due to which the background noise is cleared completely. You also get to see 6 mic support due to which you will call etc. so the next person hears your voice very clearly. The best thing for gamers is that you get 45ms ultra low latency so there is no delay in gaming time. Along with that, you also get to see the support of AI translator, which you can use from its application. As far as their battery is concerned, they are small but give you 56 hours of battery life with case which is super crazy. Realme earbuds are already launched here, if you want to buy them, you can buy them from Flipkart and tell me in the comment how you like these earbuds.
